mapper.sql: sfci.work_card, sfci.group_id, sfci.employee_id, sfci.operation_code, sfci.error_msg, sfci.data_status, sfci.attribute1, sfci.attribute2, sfci.attribute3, sfci.date, sfci.child_name, sfci.name, sfci.id, sfci.create_time, sfci.create_by, sfci.update_time, sfci.update_by

${tAlias}.work_card as ${tAlias}_work_card, ${tAlias}.group_id as ${tAlias}_group_id, ${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_employee_id, ${tAlias}.operation_code as ${tAlias}_operation_code, ${tAlias}.error_msg as ${tAlias}_error_msg, ${tAlias}.data_status as ${tAlias}_data_status, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.date as ${tAlias}_date, ${tAlias}.child_name as ${tAlias}_child_name, ${tAlias}.name as ${tAlias}_name, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by
mapper.insert: insert into swm_first_child_interface (work_card, group_id, employee_id, operation_code, error_msg, data_status, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, date, child_name, name, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) values (#{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{groupId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{operationCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{errorMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dataStatus,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{date,jdbcType=DATE}, #{childName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update swm_first_child_interface set work_card = #{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, group_id = #{groupId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, employee_id = #{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, operation_code = #{operationCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, error_msg = #{errorMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, data_status = #{dataStatus,jdbcType=CHAR}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, date = #{date,jdbcType=DATE}, child_name = #{childName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert: insert into swm_first_child_interface (work_card, group_id, employee_id, operation_code, error_msg, data_status, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, date, child_name, name, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) select right(cast('000000'+rtrim(#{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) as varchar),6), #{groupId, jdbcType = BIGINT}, isnull((select pe.id from pm_employee pe where pe.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.name = #{name, jdbcType = VARCHAR} and right(cast('000000'+rtrim(pe.work_card) as varchar),6) = right(cast('000000'+rtrim(#{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) as varchar),6)), -1), 'C', case when isnull((select pe.id from pm_employee pe where pe.name = #{name, jdbcType = VARCHAR} and right(cast('000000'+rtrim(pe.work_card) as varchar),6) = right(cast('000000'+rtrim(#{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) as varchar),6) and pe.enabled_flag = 1),-1) = -1 then '系统中没有该人员' else '' end , case when isnull((select pe.id from pm_employee pe where pe.name = #{name, jdbcType = VARCHAR} and right(cast('000000'+rtrim(pe.work_card) as varchar),6) = right(cast('000000'+rtrim(#{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) as varchar),6) and pe.enabled_flag = 1), -1) = -1 then 'F' else 'T' end, 'excel导入', null, null, #{date, jdbcType = DATE}, #{childName, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{name, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, getdate(), -1, getdate(), -1
